title: Northern Trust Corporation Form 10-K for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
note: Primary source for business segments, client asset scale, competition, regulation, net income, EPS, and return on equity.

title: Northern Trust Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
note: Used for latest quarterly profitability, client assets, segment fees, pre-tax margin, and return on average common equity.

title: What We Do | Financial Services and Investments
note: Company product page describing asset servicing, investment management, wealth management, client focus, and stated differentiators.

title: Northern Trust (NTRS) - Market capitalization
note: Market data source for June 2026 market capitalization, share price, and global market-cap rank.

title: Northern Trust (NTRS) - P/E ratio
note: Market data source for reported trailing P/E ratio as of June 2026.

title: FINOS Common Domain Model
note: Open standard and repository for financial products, trades, lifecycle events, interoperability, and straight-through processing.

title: Hyperledger Fabric
note: Project page describing Fabric as modular enterprise distributed ledger software for high-trust and regulated digital-asset use cases.

title: hyperledger/fabric
note: Public source repository documenting Apache-2.0 licensing, architecture, releases, and project maturity for Hyperledger Fabric.

title: ghostfolio/ghostfolio
note: Open-source wealth management and portfolio tracking software with self-hosting, transaction import, portfolio analysis, and AGPL-3.0 licensing.

title: Portfolio Performance
note: Homepage describing open-source portfolio performance calculation, transaction history, allocation, price imports, and exportable data.

title: portfolio-performance/portfolio
note: Public source repository for Portfolio Performance, including license, release activity, and project scope.

title: Verifiable Credentials Data Model v2.0
note: Technical standard for issuer-holder-verifier credential exchange, tamper-evident claims, verification, and privacy considerations.
